text:
Created attachment 190378
Proposed patch (since 451387 revision)

Patch to update games/pioneer port from 20171001 to 20180203 version.

Look following links for changes:
https://github.com/pioneerspacesim/pioneer/compare/20171001...20180203
https://github.com/pioneerspacesim/pioneer/blob/20180203/Changelog.txt

- Remove files/patch-data_modules_SearchRescue_SearchRescue.lua

The build was tested on FreeBSD 10.3 amd64.
